candidates.why: Clear current portion of a borrowing facility; fits short-term debt/current maturities and excludes leases.
Current portion of debt instrument; appropriate for STD when present.
Generic debt maturity within one year; appropriate if populated in some periods.
Too ambiguous to know whether this is current debt versus other liabilities.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long- Reserves Based Lending Facility

variables.notes: R:c. Selected non-lease current debt/current maturities labels only. Treated as a priority list across label changes; avoid ambiguous 'Financial liabilities' and exclude lease rows.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

Also a direct PPE label and useful across years if naming changes.
Only a component/subset of tangible assets, not preferred when total PPE label exists.

variables.notes: Used exact row labels from the sheet. 'Property and equipment' was chosen outside the shortlist because it is the clearest total PPE label; 'Plant and Equipment' retained as fallback across years.
